content: --deep Show me a Markov distribution for oil over 60 days using Polymarket anchors.

args.thought: User wants a Markov distribution for oil over 60 days using Polymarket anchors. I need to: 1) Identify the right oil ticker (USO for ETF or CL for crude futures), 2) Get current oil price, 3) Get historical prices for regime estimation (need ~30+ days), 4) Search Polymarket for oil price threshold markets, 5) Run markov_distribution tool. Starting with planning the approach.

args.thought: I have Polymarket anchors and current oil price (~$102-104 based on web search). Now I need to: 1) Extract historical prices from the web search results for 60 days, 2) Format the Polymarket markets into the required format for markov_distribution, 3) Run the markov_distribution tool. From the Investing.com search result, I can see daily prices from March 2026. From FedPrimeRate, I have weekly data going back to January 2026. I need to compile ~60 days of historical prices. Let me extract the data I have: From Investing.com snippet: Mar 31: 101.97, Mar 30: 102.88, Mar 29: 102.80, Mar 27: 99.64, Mar 26: 94.48, Mar 25: 90.32, Mar 24: 92.35, Mar 23: 88.13, Mar 20: 98.32, Mar 19: 96.14, Mar 13: 98.71, Mar 12: 95.73, Mar 9: 94.77, Mar 6: 90.90. From FedPrimeRate weekly: Mar 27: 101.16, Mar 20: 98.32, Mar 13: 98.71, Mar 6: 90.90, Feb 27: 67.02, Feb 20: 66.39, Feb 13: 62.89, Feb 6: 63.55, Jan 30: 65.21, Jan 23: 61.07, Jan 16: 59.44, Jan 9: 59.12, Jan 2: 57.32. I have enough data points. Now I need to format Polymarket markets. The markets are "Will CL hit $X by date" - these are upper-tail probabilities. For markov_distribution, I need to convert these to the format with price thresholds and probabilities. Current price is ~102-104. Let me run the markov_distribution tool with the data I have.

polymarketMarkets.question: Will Crude Oil (CL) hit $105 by end of March?
Will Crude Oil (CL) hit $110 by end of March?
Will Crude Oil (CL) hit $110 in April?
Will Crude Oil (CL) hit $150 in April?
Will Crude Oil (CL) hit $105 by end of June?
Will Crude Oil (CL) hit $150 by end of June?
